title: TPZ No Touch Infrared Forehead Thermometer | Non-Contact Digital Thermometer Suitable for Baby and Adult | Instant Temperature Checker | Room, Surface and Body Mode Thermometer | (1)
features: NO TOUCH DIGITAL THERMOMETER: Designed for the whole family; adults, babies and elderly. The contactless thermometer checker can measure instantly the temperature of the body, room or object etc. It has two modes you can set up: Body and Surface to get a more accurate measurement. The non-contact forehead thermometer is secure and more hygienic. A baby essential for baby newborns.

LCD DISPLAY: The digital thermometer has a big LCD screen to display sharp instant and fast readings—an instant-read thermometer with mute function, ideal for trace your baby’s temperature even at night. The temperature alarm is shown with a happy or grumpy face to alert you when you need professional medical assistance.

EASY MODES SWITCH: The non-contact infrared thermometer can measure the temperature within 0,5s with instant and accurate readings from 3-5cm distance. Practical than a standard mercury thermometer. Easy to change between body and surface modes, you can set the measurements in ℉ or ℃, according to your needs. Press and hold the SET button for few seconds to change the mode. Super versatile digital thermometer with the room and surface thermometer temperature mode checker.

TRACE YOUR TEMPERATURE: The non-contact thermometer will store 50 measurements to compare your body temperature changes. This allows you to trace you and your baby temperature easily. A great and practical accessory to keep in you baby room, an essential baby item.

THERMOMETER SPECIFICATIONS: Easy to use, it comes with instructions. The no-touch thermometer has two different modes and two temperatures units to choose from. The gap between the thermometer and the forehead must be 3-5 cm. The measurement time is 0.5S with a minimum error range of only ± 0.1 degrees. The No touch infrared forehead thermometer shuts off automatically after 30 seconds of not use. Power-2*AAA Batteries (Not included).
description: Product Description Care for Your Family Health Shut Off Automatically After 30 Seconds of Non-use. Switch Between Fahrenheit to Celsius (ºF to ºC). The product life is 5 years. Volume on or off Easy to carry Suitable for the whole family. NOTES: Do not use abrasive cleaners. Do not use other non-recommended methods to disinfect. This thermometer is not waterproof and should not be submerged to clean.
